heading_path: 部件 II：极致艰苦工作
locations.text_preview: Lines describe direct cross-department communication, shortest-path communication, and communication authority not being limited by hierarchy.

locations.path: /Users/tianqiang/LifeAtlas/200_原始资料/270_电子书与书籍资料/elon-book__readerlab-demo_20260629/10_中文精读/02_极致艰苦工作/部件II_极致艰苦工作.md
heading_path: 部件 II：极致艰苦工作
locations.text_preview: The five-step algorithm lists requirement challenge, deletion, simplification/optimization, acceleration, and automation in order.

locations.path: /Users/tianqiang/LifeAtlas/200_原始资料/270_电子书与书籍资料/elon-book__readerlab-demo_20260629/10_中文精读/02_极致艰苦工作/部件II_极致艰苦工作.md
heading_path: 部件 II：极致艰苦工作
locations.text_preview: The detailed steps say to challenge requirements, delete parts or processes, simplify only after deletion, accelerate only after the first three steps, and automate last.

locations.path: /Users/tianqiang/LifeAtlas/200_原始资料/270_电子书与书籍资料/elon-book__readerlab-demo_20260629/10_中文精读/02_极致艰苦工作/部件II_极致艰苦工作.md
heading_path: 部件 II：极致艰苦工作
locations.text_preview: The section frames the factory as the machine that builds the machine and says manufacturing innovation can exceed car design innovation.

locations.path: /Users/tianqiang/LifeAtlas/200_原始资料/270_电子书与书籍资料/elon-book__readerlab-demo_20260629/10_中文精读/02_极致艰苦工作/部件II_极致艰苦工作.md
heading_path: 部件 II：极致艰苦工作
locations.text_preview: The section distinguishes prototypes from mass production and says production systems can require far more work than the product design itself.
